## Source: amazon-inspector (37804be2613b17c7c5401a43691f95014904146dbfc9412683e0b171df31605b)
The package path-extend was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (52c2661ca17328d4f67902e131d03e548f17b06da170068f83a8ec9c591903ad)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'path-extend' @ 1.0.6 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
